name: Superpowers (Brainstorming & Planning)
description: Smart brainstorming and structured planning for OpenClaw agents. Detects task-like prompts and guides the agent through a design-first workflow: clarify → propose approaches → write spec → create implementation plan.

autoDetect.label: Auto Detect
autoDetect.help: Automatically detect task-like prompts and inject brainstorming flow

language.label: Language
language.help: Preferred language for brainstorming prompts (auto, zh, en)

specDir.label: Spec Directory
specDir.help: Directory for design specs (relative to workspace)

planDir.label: Plan Directory
planDir.help: Directory for implementation plans (relative to workspace)

skipPatterns.label: Skip Patterns
skipPatterns.help: Regex patterns for prompts that should skip brainstorming

memoryEnabled.label: Memory Integration
memoryEnabled.help: Enable OpenViking memory recall before brainstorming and auto-capture after decisions

memory.label: Memory Config
memory.help: OpenViking connection settings for memory (uses same backend as openviking plugin)
